name: Icon Callout Box Section
description: Light Blue accent-shape box (radius 40px 8px 40px 8px) with left-aligned Brand Blue Nunito Sans 800 ~21px/28px text and a white icon badge (radius 20px 4px 20px 4px, drop shadow) straddling the box's left edge, center on the edge. Wrapper padding-left W/2 (40px) insets the box.
notes: Corner radii (box 40px 8px 40px 8px; badge 20px 4px 20px 4px) and the drop shadow are mandatory. Outlook ignores position:absolute — brand-safe option is to pre-composite the badge as a transparent PNG; otherwise accept the Outlook degrade (badge flush at inner-left).
